# detectCostSpike

> Detect if a feature/team cost has spiked compared to baseline

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| item | json | yes |
| db | Database | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[baseline: call getCostTrend]
  A --> B[avgBaseline: transform]
  B --> C[isSpike: condition]
  C --> D[noSpike: return]
```

## Output

Type: `CostInsight`
